title: askellia sogdiana
intro: Askellia sogdiana, also known as Sogdian aster, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Askellia sogdiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as acne and eczema. Askellia sogdiana can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
